title: Base L2 Smart Contract Launchpad Skill
author: JSONbored
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/base-l2-smart-contract-launchpad.zip -o base-l2-smart-contract-launchpad.zip && unzip -o base-l2-smart-contract-launchpad.zip -d ./base-l2-smart-contract-launchpad

Usage:
Use this skill to move Base contract releases from idea to verified deployment with fewer operational mistakes.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Run the Base L2 smart contract launchpad skill for this release."

# Required output
1) Deployment plan and environment config
2) Verification and explorer checklist
3) Risk controls and emergency procedures
4) Post-launch monitoring actions
detailMarkdown:
# Base L2 Smart Contract Launchpad Skill

Ship smart contracts on Base with secure deployment, verification, environment management, and production-readiness checklists.

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/base-l2-smart-contract-launchpad.zip -o base-l2-smart-contract-launchpad.zip && unzip -o base-l2-smart-contract-launchpad.zip -d ./base-l2-smart-contract-launchpad
```

## Usage
Use this skill to move Base contract releases from idea to verified deployment with fewer operational mistakes.
